completed.title: Graph & bot final polish — companion linking, entity extraction fix, Slop-first bot strategy, dashboard type breakdown

Bot polish v2 — Slop-only, model upgrade to Sonnet 4.6, source linking
Visual pizazz — ASCII art header, Latent Space purple accent, terminal flair
Identity, dev process & repo cleanup — establish LSH as the product, set up workflow, fix stale code
Schema cleanup + typed entity model — finalize DB structure with node_type, port RA-H UX

Discord bot v2 — grounded guides, temporal context, and deterministic channel triggers

Data refinement & hygiene — type migration, descriptions/notes, dates, edge cleanup

builders-club-prep.notes: Brad presenting LS Hub + Slop at Builders Club. Create presentation brief, demo flow script, pre-demo checklist, fallback screenshots. No code — documentation and preparation.

tasks.text: Part 1: Create presentation brief with talking points and structure
Part 2: Write demo flow script (8-step sequence)
Part 3: Pre-demo checklist — verify all surfaces working
Part 4: Capture fallback screenshots/recordings
Part 5: Quick polish pass on demo-visible surfaces

builders-club-prep.title: Builders Club presentation prep — talking points, demo flow, checklist, fallback assets

entity-extraction-audit.notes: Extraction logic duplicated in processing.ts and cron route. Race condition on dedup. No audit trail. Consolidate into shared entityExtractor.ts, fix dedup, validate AINews frontmatter, centralize explanation templates, extend blocklist.

tasks.text: Part 1: Create shared src/services/extraction/entityExtractor.ts
Part 2: Fix deduplication race condition (deduplicate before processing)
Part 3: Add AINews frontmatter validation
Part 4: Centralize explanation templates
Part 5: Add extraction audit trail in node metadata
Part 6: Extend blocklist and make configurable

entity-extraction-audit.title: Entity extraction pipeline audit & cleanup — deduplicate code, fix race conditions, add audit trail

evals-dashboard.notes: Fix broken bot logging (column mismatch), capture tool calls + MCP operations + timing, build /evals dashboard to review traces, then extend with golden dataset (10-15 scenarios), automated runner, and scoring. Absorbed PRD-26 (eval suite). Uses existing chats table — no migration needed.

tasks.text: Part 1: Rewrite bot logging — align to chats schema, capture tool calls + timing
Part 2: Build /evals dashboard — list view + expanded trace view
Part 3: API route — paginated queries with filters
Part 4: Define eval types and scenario schema
Part 5: Create golden dataset — 10-15 scenarios
Part 6: Build eval runner + eval API endpoint
Part 7: Extend /evals dashboard — source filter, scenario results, aggregate metrics
Part 8: Add npm run evals script

evals-dashboard.title: Evals — interaction logging, trace dashboard, golden dataset & automated testing

inbox.notes: New /inbox route showing all Discord interactions grouped by user as conversations. Detail view per conversation. Inbox stats on dashboard. Reuses chats table. Future: email integration.

tasks.text: Part 1: API routes — /api/inbox (list conversations) + /api/inbox/[userId] (conversation detail)
Part 2: Build /inbox page — conversation list with user avatars, last message preview, unread count
Part 3: Conversation detail view — threaded message display with tool call traces
Part 4: Add inbox stats to dashboard (total conversations, active users, messages today)
Part 5: Add inbox to sidebar navigation

inbox.title: Inbox — conversation-style view of all bot interactions (Discord now, email later)

setup-handover.notes: No code. Owner does 3 tasks (invite bot, create webhooks, test channel), then Brad tests and switches to live.

setup-handover.title: Setup & handover — get bot and webhooks live in the LS Discord server
